name: iso27001-mcp
description: Stateful ISO 27001:2022 ISMS management for Claude — gap analysis, risk register, policies, audits, and evidence tracking via the Model Context Protocol

scripts.postbuild: rm -rf dist/seed && mkdir -p dist/seed && cp -r src/seed/policy-templates dist/seed/policy-templates && cp -r src/seed/procedure-templates dist/seed/procedure-templates
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.postinstall:
node -e "require('better-sqlite3-multiple-ciphers')" 2>/dev/null || echo "
⚠️  iso27001-mcp: Native SQLite module failed to load. You may need build tools installed.
   macOS: xcode-select --install
   Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt-get install build-essential python3
   Windows: https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/ → Build Tools for Visual Studio → Desktop development with C++
   See: https://github.com/Sushegaad/MCP-Server-for-ISO27001#prerequisites
"
